name: Apple Cooler
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pitcher, combine apple juice, apricot nectar, lime juice, and Equal.
2. Pour 1 1/2 ounces of rum into each glass.
3. Add half the juice mixture to each glass.
4. Fill glasses with crushed ice and club soda.
5. Stir gently.
WARNING: Consult your doctor or dietician as to whether your diet allows for the intake of the 3 ounces of rum. Calories per serving: 199. Traditional calories: 225. Diabetic exchange: 2 1/2 fruit, 2 fat.
